title: Can't pass an unpacked array as a parameter to module

features.name: unpacked array module parameter
features.description: Code should include a module parameter declared as an unpacked array type where the array size uses a parameter N
features.snippet:
parameter N = 1;
parameter logic signed [8-1:0] ARRAY[N] = '{default: 0}

features.name: command-line -G override with unpacked array literal
features.description: Code should include a module with an unpacked array parameter that is overridden via command-line -G flag using a quoted array literal value

features.name: unpacked array default value with default keyword
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array parameter default value using the 'default keyword inside array literal syntax
